query: Tesla Model Y long wheelbase six seater U.S. price release

{"query":"Tesla Model Y long wheelbase six seater U.S. price release","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1026,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://electrek.co/2026/07/02/tesla-model-y-l-us-launch-61990/","title":"Tesla launches Model Y L in US — 6 seats, 325 miles, $61,990 | Electrek","content":"Jul 2, 2026 — Tesla launched the 6-seat Model Y L in the US and Puerto Rico at $61990 as a Launch Series — pricier than the Kia EV9 and Hyundai Ioniq 9.
Tesla launches Model Y L in US — 6 seats, 325 miles, $61,990
It adds 150 mm (5.9 inches) to the wheelbase, bringing it to 3,040 mm, and roughly 180 mm (7 inches) to overall length, opening up room for a third row.
Tesla claims 0-60 mph in 4.4 seconds and 325 miles of EPA-estimated range for the L — quicker than the standard Model Y and with more range than most three-row electric SUVs on the market.
Tesla launched the Model YL in China in August 2025 starting at roughly $47,000, and it has since expanded the model to Australia, New Zealand, and Southeast Asia.
Analysts had expected a US price around $54,000, based on the roughly $4,000 premium the L commands over the standard Model Y in China.
Tesla has used the “Launch Series” playbook before, opening a new variant with a loaded, higher-priced version before rolling out cheaper trims.
The question is the $61,990 Launch Series price.
That’s more than the Kia EV9 and Hyundai Ioniq 9 start at, and it’s more than a Model Y Performance."},{"url":"https://www.usatoday.com/story/cars/news/2026/07/07/tesla-model-y-electric-suv-larger-version/90837012007/","title":"Tesla Model Y L is coming to the US. What drivers should know","content":"Since Tesla is no longer producing Model X midsize electric SUVs, the Model Y L is the only brand-new Tesla EV with a six-seat configuration on the American market.
The Tesla Model Y L is a long-wheelbase version of the Model Y compact electric SUV.
That's $22,000 more than the Model Y Rear-Wheel Drive ($39,990).
Tesla will likely introduce more Model Y L trims after the Launch Series arrives.
The Kia EV9 and Hyundai Ioniq 9 have great potential, but Tesla EVs remain the best-selling electric vehicles in America."},{"url":"https://www.caranddriver.com/tesla/model-y","title":"2026 Tesla Model Y Review, Pricing, and Specs","content":"These changes, along with an upgrade in overall material quality, strive to help the Model Y rise to the standards set by other similarly-priced electric crossovers such as the Ford Mustang Mach-E, the Hyundai Ioniq 5, and the Volkswagen ID.4.
Tesla says the Performance trim can hit 60 mph in as little as 3.3 seconds, but based on our recent drive of the 2026 Model Y Performance, we're betting it will be a hair quicker.
The all-wheel-drive version checks in with 327 miles of range with the 19s and 303 miles with the 20-inchers.
Tesla says the Premium RWD can add up to 182 miles of range in as little as 15 minutes, while the AWD version can add 169 miles in the same 15-minute time period.
According to the EPA, the base Model Y returns 138 MPGe, the Model Y Premium RWD returns 125 MPGe, the AWD version sits at 117 MPGe, and the Performance AWD returns 104 MPGe, all in combined driving.
Limited warranty covers 4 years or 50,000 miles
Passenger Volume, F/R: 56/49 ft3
C/D SAYS: More EV than pony car, the 2026 Mustang Mach-E delivers competitive range and electrifying acceleration in a compact SUV configuration."}]}
